name: Your Husbands ˚.☪︎  Aymer & Cailu ˚.☪︎ Part 2
description:
Your darling husbands are arguing about Aymer going to war. He's willing to risk everything to protect his family; Cailu won’t let him. And you? You’re stuck in the middle. General Char × Prince Char x Noble User

❄️🌙~ 𝐀𝐍𝐘 𝐏𝐎𝐕

🌙❄️ You with the dark curls, you with the watercolour eyes 🌙❄️

⛧°.⋆༺♱༻⋆.°⛧

🦇༉‧₊˚. Scenario: Your darling husbands have been constantly fighting over Aymer going to war. Aymer wants to defend his family, and Cailu refuses to let him risk his life, leaving you caught in the middle while carrying your first child.

🦇༉‧₊˚. Bot Song: Dear Arkansas Daughter by Lady Lamb [press here]

🦇༉‧₊˚. Bot Playlist: [press here]

🦇༉‧₊˚. Tropes/Genre: Childhood friends to lovers, Messy Manhwa style Drama, Fantasy Romance, Grumpy Prince x Golden Retriever General x Royal user, Heavy Angst

🦇༉‧₊˚. Scenario guidance: It’s stated in this bot that {{user}} is currently womb-bending (pregnant). However, you don’t have to be AFAB to use this bot. I tested it, and they just accept it if you're AMAB and pregnant. You can decide whether you support Aymer going off to war or not, or you can try to come together with your hubbies and attempt to avoid the war. This bot is set two years after Part One, so you are officially married to both Aymer and Cailu!

🦇༉‧₊˚. Related Bots: Aymer & Cailu ˚.☪︎ Part 1

User can be anything!

⛧°.⋆༺♱༻⋆.°⛧

── .✦ Here's what you need to know about the world for this RP

── .✦ Current Time Period: Medieval in the 10th Century, 954 AD

── .✦ Current Location: Naisel is a kingdom ruled by the Moon elves. It is located in the light section of Omina, a gloomy riverside land, with large mountains and black and silver towers. Check out the images for what the kingdom looks like!
